Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Daijiro Kabata. Author, maintainer, copyright holder.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Kabata D, Stuart EA, Shintani A (2024). “Prognostic score-based model averaging approach for propensity score estimation.” BMC Medical Research Methodology, 24, 228. doi:10.1186/s12874-024-02350-y. 

@Article{,
  title = {Prognostic score-based model averaging approach for propensity score estimation},
  author = {Daijiro Kabata and Elizabeth A. Stuart and Ayumi Shintani},
  journal = {BMC Medical Research Methodology},
  year = {2024},
  volume = {24},
  pages = {228},
  doi = {10.1186/s12874-024-02350-y},
}

Kabata D (2026). psAve: Model-Averaged Propensity Scores Selected by Prognostic-Score Balance. R package version 1.0.1, https://github.com/kabajiro/psAve. 

@Manual{,
  title = {psAve: Model-Averaged Propensity Scores Selected by Prognostic-Score Balance},
  author = {Daijiro Kabata},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 1.0.1},
  url = {https://github.com/kabajiro/psAve},
}
